---
title: "research"
title-block-banner: false
---

*Coming soon — I'm building out descriptions of my current and past research projects.*

<!-- 
Organize by scientific question, e.g.:

## How does the brain integrate proprioception with motor control?

Description, representative figure, links to papers and code.

## How do neural populations in motor cortex coordinate movement?

Description, representative figure, links to papers and code.
-->
